resources.string: Know the instant an app checks Play Integrity.
Notifies you whenever an app requests a Google Play Integrity verdict. Scope it to Google Play Store.
Alerts when a watched app uses the Play Integrity API.
%1$s (%2$s) just asked Google Play for a Play Integrity verdict.
Watching Google Play Store ✓\nLast request seen %1$s.
Module loaded ✓\nTick Google Play Store in the scope, then restart it.
Module not active\nEnable it in LSPosed, scope Google Play Store, then restart it.
Enable in LSPosed → scope Google Play Store → Restart Play Store. If it’s hidden in the scope list, turn on “Show system apps”.
Play Store restarted — the hook will reload.
Tap “Force stop”, then reopen Play Store so the module loads into it.
Get alerted only for the apps you tick.
